interfaces.name: getHomepageSummary
interfaces.description: Get content for the homepage, including intro text, featured species, featured teaching resources, and quick stats.

intro_html.description: HTML or markdown introduction to the site’s purpose and scope.

highlight_text.description: Short description or why this species is featured.

interfaces.name: getUserToolsSummary
interfaces.description: Get a summary of user tools for header/homepage shortcuts, including counts of collections, comparisons, favorites, and bookmarks.

interfaces.name: getSpeciesSearchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options and defaults for the Species Search & Results or Advanced Search interfaces, including habitats, regions, taxonomy, traits, statuses, and sort options.

habitat_types.description: Available habitat types for filtering species.

radula_types.description: Morphological trait filter options for radula type.

regions.description: Region options (e.g., north_america, indo_pacific, western_atlantic, japan, australia).

taxonomic_classes.description: Top-level mollusk classes for browse-by-group (e.g., Cephalopoda, Gastropoda).

taxonomic_families.description: Selected families commonly browsed (e.g., Muricidae, Tridacnidae).

sort_options.description: Available sort options for species search results.

interfaces.name: searchSpecies
interfaces.description: Search and filter species, supporting keyword search, advanced filters, taxonomic and trait filters, region-based filters, and multiple sort criteria.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search on scientific or common name, e.g., 'tridacna'.

min_depth_m.description: Filter by minimum recorded depth (species min_depth_m >= this value).

max_depth_m.description: Filter by maximum recorded depth (species max_depth_m <= this value).

min_shell_body_length_cm.description: Filter by minimum shell/body length (species min_length_cm >= this value).

min_max_length_cm.description: Filter by minimum of the species' maximum length (species max_length_cm >= this value).

region_ids.description: Restrict species to those present in at least one of these regions.

require_invasive_in_any_region.description: If true, only include species that are invasive or introduced in at least one region.

first_record_year_min.description: Restrict to species with at least one SpeciesDistribution.first_record_year >= this value.

class_id.description: Restrict to a specific class (e.g., Cephalopoda, Gastropoda).

family_id.description: Restrict to a specific family (e.g., Muricidae).

genus_id.description: Restrict to a specific genus (e.g., Tridacna).

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort field, e.g., 'max_depth_desc', 'max_length_desc', 'conservation_status_severity_desc', 'year_described_asc'.

key_regions.description: Short list of representative region names, e.g., ['Indo-Pacific', 'Japan'].

interfaces.name: getSpeciesDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a species, including taxonomy, habitat, depth, size, distribution, conservation, traits, and user-related flags (collections, comparisons, bookmarks).

parameters.name: speciesId
parameters.description: Identifier of the species to display on the Species Detail page.

distributions.description: Region-level distribution records for this species.

collections.description: Collections this species is part of.

comparison_sets.description: Comparison sets this species is part of.

interfaces.name: addSpeciesToCollection
interfaces.description: Add a species to a collection. If an existing collectionId is provided, the species is added to that collection. If new_collection_name is provided without collectionId, a new collection is created and the species is added in a single operation.

parameters.name: speciesId
parameters.description: Species to add to the collection (called from Species Detail).

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: Existing collection to add the species to.

parameters.name: new_collection_name
parameters.description: If provided and collectionId is not set, create a new collection with this name and add the species.

parameters.name: new_collection_description
parameters.description: Optional description for the new collection.

interfaces.name: addSpeciesToComparison
interfaces.description: Add a species to a comparison set. If an existing comparison_set_id is provided, the species is added to that set. If new_comparison_name is provided without comparison_set_id, a new comparison set is created and the species is added in a single operation.

parameters.name: speciesId
parameters.description: Species to add to the comparison (called from Species Detail).

parameters.name: comparisonSetId
parameters.description: Existing comparison set to add the species to.

parameters.name: new_comparison_name
parameters.description: If provided and comparisonSetId is not set, create a new comparison set with this name and add the species.

parameters.name: new_comparison_description
parameters.description: Optional description for the new comparison set.

interfaces.name: setSpeciesBookmarkStatus
interfaces.description: Set the bookmark status for a species, creating or removing a bookmark in a single-user context.

parameters.name: speciesId
parameters.description: Species to bookmark or unbookmark.

parameters.name: isBookmarked
parameters.description: true to bookmark, false to remove from bookmarks.

interfaces.name: getCollectionsOverview
interfaces.description: List all collections created by the user with species counts, for the Collections & Lists page and header shortcuts.

interfaces.name: getCollectionDetail
interfaces.description: Get details and member species for a specific collection, for the Collections & Lists page.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: Collection to display.

interfaces.name: updateCollection
interfaces.description: Rename or update the description of an existing collection.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: Collection to update.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: New name for the collection (if changing).

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: New description for the collection (if changing).

interfaces.name: removeSpeciesFromCollection
interfaces.description: Remove a species from a specific collection.

interfaces.name: deleteCollection
interfaces.description: Delete an entire collection and all its membership, used from the Collections & Lists page.

parameters.name: confirm
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm deletion.

interfaces.name: getComparisonSetsOverview
interfaces.description: List all comparison sets available for the user, with species counts, for the Comparisons page and header shortcuts.

interfaces.name: getComparisonSetDetail
interfaces.description: Get details and member species for a specific comparison set, displayed side by side for comparisons of size, depth, conservation status, and distribution.

parameters.name: comparisonSetId
parameters.description: Comparison set to display.

interfaces.name: updateComparisonSet
interfaces.description: Rename or update the description of a comparison set.

interfaces.name: removeSpeciesFromComparison
interfaces.description: Remove a species from a comparison set.

interfaces.name: deleteComparisonSet
interfaces.description: Delete an entire comparison set and all its membership.

parameters.name: confirm
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm deletion.

interfaces.name: getTeachingResourceFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filters for the Teaching Resources page, including target age groups and publication year ranges.

interfaces.name: searchTeachingResources
interfaces.description: Search teaching resources by keyword, target age, and publication year range for the Teaching Resources page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Keyword search in title, description, topics, and keywords, e.g., 'cephalopod camouflage'.

target_age_min.description: Minimum target age in years, e.g., 12.

target_age_max.description: Maximum target age in years, e.g., 14.

publication_year_start.description: Start of publication year range, e.g., 2019.

publication_year_end.description: End of publication year range, e.g., 2024.

interfaces.name: getTeachingResourceDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a teaching resource, used on the Teaching Resource Detail page.

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: Identifier of the teaching resource.

interfaces.name: setResourceFavoriteStatus
interfaces.description: Add or remove a teaching resource from the single-user favorites list.

parameters.name: isFavorite
parameters.description: true to add to favorites, false to remove.

interfaces.name: getFavoriteResourcesList
interfaces.description: List all teaching resources that the user has favorited, for the Favorites page.

interfaces.name: getBookmarkedSpeciesList
interfaces.description: List all species that the user has bookmarked, for the Bookmarks page.

interfaces.name: getDistributionRegionsFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get region and country filters for the interactive Distribution Map, including country-level regions like Japan and Australia and larger regions like indo_pacific.

interfaces.name: getSpeciesForDistributionMap
interfaces.description: Get species matching current region selections for the Distribution Map, including support for species present in all selected regions and optional exclusion of regions.

parameters.name: presence_mode
parameters.description: How to interpret selected regions: 'any_selected' (present in at least one) or 'all_selected' (present in all).

parameters.name: excludedRegionIds
parameters.description: Regions where species must NOT be present (e.g., exclude australia to find japan-only species).

interfaces.name: getSpeciesDistributionForMap
interfaces.description: Get regions and distribution flags for a specific species, to center and highlight it on the Distribution Map when navigating from a Species Detail page.

interfaces.name: searchTaxa
interfaces.description: Search taxonomic entities (e.g., find a genus like Tridacna) for taxon filters and browse-by-group entry points.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Text to match against taxon names, e.g., 'tridacna'.

parameters.name: rank
parameters.description: Optional rank restriction, e.g., 'class', 'family', 'genus'.

interfaces.name: getTaxaForBrowse
interfaces.description: Get taxa for browse-by-group navigation, optionally scoped by parent taxon and rank (e.g., list mollusk classes, or families within a class).

parameters.name: rank
parameters.description: Rank to list, e.g., 'class', 'family', 'genus'.

parameters.name: parentTaxonId
parameters.description: Optional parent taxon to scope results (e.g., families within class Cephalopoda).

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page, including site purpose, coverage, data sources, curation methods, and contact information.

interfaces.name: getHelpPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Help / How to Use page, including task-based guides, FAQs, and links to main sections.

guides_html.description: Task-based walkthroughs (advanced search, building collections, using comparisons, exploring the map, teaching resources).

faqs_html.description: FAQs explaining size, depth, conservation, trait data, and user tools.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateNamedCollection
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find a collection by name or create it if it does not exist, used by addSpeciesToCollection when only new_collection_name is provided.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateNamedComparisonSet
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find a comparison set by name or create it if it does not exist, used by addSpeciesToComparison when only new_comparison_name is provided.

helperFunctions.name: _loadUserStateFromStorage
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load single-user state (collections, comparisons, favorites, bookmarks) from local storage or initialize defaults.
